title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RBSXTsqG-5acD, SXTsq 5 ac, L3
description: The SXTsq 5 ac is a compact and lightweight outdoor 5Ghz 802.11ac wireless device with an integrated antenna, perfect for point-to-point links or as a CPE unit. The device includes one 10/100/1000 Mbit Ethernet port to fully utilize speeds that 802.11ac protocol provides The SXTsq 5 ac retains a 16 dBi antenna like the SXT 5 ac, our previous model, yet the antenna design has been improved and the physical size has been dramatically reduced - the SXTsq is two times thinner Device Power adapter 24V/0.38A PoE injector Metal ring
specsSearch: Wireless features Tx power [dBm] 25 Wireless frequency 5 GHz WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11n, 802.11a Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 23 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 23 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Antenna gain [dBi] 16 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 10 .. 30V DC Power type PoE PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 7 Physical characteristics Design Outdoor Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 129 Height [mm] 129 Depth [mm] 34 Hardware CPU IPQ-4018 CPU frequency [MHz] 716 CPU cores 4 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 256
